case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. REZA N SETIAWAN et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SETIAWAN, REZA N DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-11-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-10-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-27-2003

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $159.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SETIAWAN, REZA N
